title: heracleum barbatum subsp. moellendorffii
intro: Heracleum barbatum subsp. moellendorffii, also known as Angelica pubescens or Chinese Angelica, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits are numerous, including reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and protecting against liver and kidney damage. Herbal preparations of Heracleum barbatum subsp. moellendorffii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
